characters.name: Yu
characters.description: YuFemaleMaleInformationResidenceSourceHomeworldTopGenderFemale/MaleMarital StatusIn a relationshipRelativesKay(boyfriend/girlfriend)Erena(mother)Behind the scenesVoice ActorJanine Harouni - FemaleRyan Highley - Male Ryan Highley - Male Yuis one of the main protagonists inHaven, alongside their boyfriend/girlfriend,Kay. The two fled theApiaryafter Kay was slated to be given to their mate. A highly intelligent woman/man, Yu is an engineer and is very good at what they do. However, they have a tendency to ignore the reality of their situation, and hadn’t even thought about the Apiary coming to find them until Kay brought it up long after their arrival onSource. Yu doesn’t like walking around aimlessly and much prefers to utilize the technology that they have toGlidearound the planet. They’re argumentative and quick to assume.

characters.name: Erena
characters.description: ErenaInformationGenderFemaleRelativesYu(Daughter/Son) Erenais a character fromHaven. She is next head ofExoNovaand the mother of series protagonist,Yu.

characters.name: Erena
characters.description: ErenaInformationGenderFemaleRelativesYu(Daughter/Son) Erenais a character fromHaven. She is next head ofExoNovaand the mother of series protagonist,Yu.

characters.name: Kay
characters.actor_name: Christopher Lew Kum Hoi - MaleLexie Anne Kendrick - Female
characters.description: KayMaleFemaleInformationResidenceSourceHomeworldTruthGenderMale/FemaleMarital StatusIn a relationshipRelativesYu(girlfriend)/(boyfriend)Behind the scenesVoice ActorChristopher Lew Kum Hoi - MaleLexie Anne Kendrick - Female Lexie Anne Kendrick - Female Kayis one of the main protagonists inHaven, alongside their partner ,Yu. The two fled theApiaryafter they were slated to be given to their mate. Kay is a highly intelligent biologist who is much more concerned with the reality of their situation than Yu is. While Yu would rather live in the moment, Kay wants to be prepared for any problems that may arise if the Apiary finds them. They try to make the best of the situation they’re in through use of comedic relief, as seen when they prepare theappledewsin different ways and gives each "recipe" a fancy name, despite it being their only food source. They are also brave, caring, and loyal.

characters.name: Ozias
characters.description: Lord OziasInformationGenderMaleMarital StatusFormerly betrothed (toYu)Behind the scenesVoice ActorHarrison Collett Lord Oziasis the main antagonist inHaven. He was betrothed to series protagonist,Yu. As the main antagonist (Big A-hole) he wants to get Yu back and split up the main protagonist couple.  He is seen by both protagonists as a monster through several discussions.  Late in the game they have a single remote conversation with Ozias that confirms many of their fears about him and the world they fled.  In some ways he's just a symptom of the Matchmaker system.  He feels he has a right to Yu due to them being matched.
